text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I just hate to see you like this... I like you best
when you're smiling...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I found that line in one of the romance manga my
juniors are so enamored with these days. How did
I do?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I do apologize for the scare. But I can assure you
that it wasn't a lie.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
After all, I would love nothing more than for you
to be happy and full of life.
